## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI/Tooling

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`

## Checklist

- [ ] Added/updated tests
- [ ] Updated documentation
- [ ] No unrelated changes included
